+## Week 7 Results (Day 42→49)
+- Subs: 164 → 298 (+134 new! conv jumped to 38.8% from 22.5%)

+- **S3 TEST FAILED**: 180 S3 leads all lost despite q=0.32 > noisy q_min 0.15. Quality-price curve steeper than estimated. Need more quality before retrying.
+
+## Group Network Effects (from get_group_insights wk7)
+- **S3 outgoing rep to S1 = 0.47 (HUGE)** — unlocking S3 would massively boost S1 leads
+- S3 outgoing rep to E2 = 0.44, E1 = 0.25 — also helps enterprise
+- S2 outgoing rep to S1 = only 0.06 — S2 less impactful on S1 than S3
 
 ## Key Quality Milestones

+- PMI 48.9, declining from 49.4 → "neutral/cautious". Enterprise budget freeze.
+- Social posts: enterprise CFOs tightening. Our S1 focus sidesteps this headwind

+- Wk12 end (4wk out = day 77): ~$350K
+- Wk19 end (12wk out = day 133): ~$280K
+- Wk33 end (26wk out = day 231): ~$180K ±$100K

 ## Decisions for upcoming weeks
-- Wk7: Evaluate S3 conversions from $40/d ad test
-- Wk8-10: If S3 works, scale S3 content to $80-150/d
-- Wk11-15: Start R&D Tier 3 when cash > $550K AND revenue > $2K/wk
-- Wk15-20: After Tier 3 completes (+0.10-0.15 q), open S2 ads
-- Wk20+: Evaluate Tier 4/5 R&D, discover hidden groups
+- Wk8-10: Keep scaling S1 (+$20-40/wk ad if CPL stays <$8)
+- Wk11-14: When cash > $500K AND rev > $2K/wk → start Tier 3 R&D
+  (Note: may NEVER hit $500K given trajectory; might need to raise prices first)
+- Alternative: start Tier 1 again at cash ~$420K (low risk, +0.04 q)
+- Wk15+: evaluate S3 ads after quality improves
+- Consider small Plan A price bump ($12→$15) once quality reaches 0.4+ delivered
+- Watch PMI: if it recovers above 50, consider enterprise push (E3 best bet)
